name: Trump Trade War
short_description: 2.5d Platformer where you control president Trump in fictional world. Mission to avoid traps and enemies and try to get end of level where are money he needs
detailed_description:
STORY:

Player controls President Trump in this 2.5 Platformer game. Game contains 12 maps. Trump mission is to finish levels and collect money bags every level. Other countries have added traps and turtle and bee enemies, so that President Trump need to use all his skills to get more tariff trade moneys. Levels contains different traps like firetraps, spikes, moving spikes, cannons etc. Levels contains also 2 different moving and deathly enemies bees and turtles.

 Trump can avoid enemies or shoot them with flames. There are also some moving and jump platform which Trump can use. Some levels player need find key to open doors to continue level and also falling to lava will kill player and after death player will respawn to checkpoint area.
So can you make Usa great again and find all money bags end of every levels

Control Input:

Movement: W - A - S - D
Jump: Space
Double Jump: Space
Dash: Shift
Shoot Mouse Right Click

FEATURES:

  • 12 levels
    - End of level money bags which gives steam achievements
    - Different traps like: Cannons, Fire traps, spike traps, moving traps
    - Moving platforms
    - Keys which opens unlocked doors
    - Enemies: moving turtle and bee which kills player
    - Player can shoot
    - Coins to collect
    - Checkpoint system. Balloon is checkpoint area
    - Collect hearts to get more lifes

  • Falling out of map to lava etc will kill player
